description_long: This object is a single, medium-sized red onion with a teardrop shape and a slightly pointed top where the dried stem remains attached. The surface is covered in a thin, papery outer skin that is mostly intact, displaying a range of deep red to purplish hues with some lighter and darker patches. The bulb is smooth and rounded, with subtle vertical ridges and a few blemishes or scuff marks visible on the skin. The base of the onion is rounded and does not show any visible root tuft, indicating it has been trimmed. No green shoots or sprouting stems are present. The overall appearance suggests a fresh, unpeeled onion suitable for culinary use.
description: A medium-sized, teardrop-shaped red onion with mostly intact papery skin, deep red coloration, and a dried stem at the top.
description_view_0: This view shows the onion's rounded side with a prominent dried stem at the top and some surface blemishes on the left.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the onion's base, showing a smoother surface with a visible vertical streak and a slightly darker patch.
description_view_2: The onion appears more symmetrical from this view, with a smooth, even surface and the dried stem slightly bent to the left.
description_view_3: This view reveals a pronounced vertical ridge running from the top to the base, with a mix of lighter and darker red tones.
attribute_bulb_segmentation: The bulb appears as a single continuous structure with subtle vertical ridges; no distinct lobes or segments are clearly visible.
attribute_papery_outer_skin: The papery outer skin is mostly intact, covering the entire bulb with a reddish-purple color and a matte, slightly flaky texture. Some minor blemishes and scuffs are present.
attribute_root_tuft: No root tuft is present; the base appears trimmed and smooth with no visible roots.
attribute_green_shoot_presence: No green shoots or sprouting stems are visible emerging from the onion.
attribute_location_relative_to_urban_ele: No urban elements or contextual surfaces are visible; the onion appears isolated against a plain background with no indication of indoor or outdoor placement.
